Title: Relates to reporting allegations of child abuse or maltreatment that occurred to a resident of New York in another state
Summary: Relates to reporting allegations of child abuse or maltreatment that occurred to a resident of New York in another state to an agency having similar powers in the state in which the allegations occurred.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the social services law, in relation to reporting of allegations of child abuse or maltreatment that occurred to a resident of New York in another state
